# INSpatialEvent.depart

**Case**

A constant indicating to deliver events upon leaving the specified location.

## Declaration

```swift
case depart
```

## Constants

- **INSpatialEvent.unknown**: A constant indicating an unknown trigger condition.
- **INSpatialEvent.arrive**: A constant indicating to deliver events upon arriving at the specified location.

items.description: A constant indicating an unknown trigger condition.

items.description: A constant indicating to deliver events upon arriving at the specified location.
